response.original_title: はじめてAVの撮影現場に来た新人カメラマンさんが、目を疑うほどキレイだったので「AV現場の常識だよ」と強引にセクハラしまくり、最後にはファックまでするよう追い込みました！
response.overview: Who would have thought the female photographer would be so beautiful! The hunter staff, convinced that this encounter with such a juicy target was fate, put their usual "it's common sense in AV" strategy into full use for their erotic seduction plan! Touching her breasts and ass as a greeting was a given. They pointed out her minor mistakes and apologized with sex! And finally, the evil scenario for successful penetration unfolded!
response.title: A rookie cameraman, on his first AV shoot, was so stunningly beautiful that he couldn't believe his eyes. So, I aggressively sexually harassed him, telling him, "This is normal on AV sets," and eventually pressured him into having sex with me!
